caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with some text on it. The setting appears to be a studio, as indicated by the professional audio equipment and the backdrop with stars and text that reads "Unique Hustle." The man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his right hand while speaking into the microphone. His expression suggests he is making a point or explaining something with enthusiasm. The overall atmosphere is focused and professional, typical of a talk show or interview format.
